mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO semantic_call_edge (id, task_id, caller_symbol_id, callee_symbol_id, caller_chunk_id, callee_chunk_id, call_site_line, called_name, expression, edge_type, confidence, resolution_reason, argument_mapping) VALUES
(#{edge.id}, #{edge.taskId}, #{edge.callerSymbolId}, #{edge.calleeSymbolId}, #{edge.callerChunkId}, #{edge.calleeChunkId}, #{edge.callSiteLine}, #{edge.calledName}, #{edge.expression}, #{edge.edgeType}, #{edge.confidence}, #{edge.resolutionReason}, #{edge.argumentMapping})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM semantic_call_edge WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY call_site_line, id
